content.text:
<user_query>
In cursor, how do I archive all agents' chats?
</user_query>

Cursor doesn’t currently have a **“Archive all agent chats”** bulk action (as of now).  
You can archive chats **one at a time** from the Chat/Agents history list:

1. Open the chat history sidebar.
2. Hover a chat thread.
3. Click the `...` menu (or right-click).
4. Choose **Archive**.

If you want, I can also give you a quick terminal command to back up all local agent transcripts in one shot (outside the UI), which is the closest thing to bulk-archive today.

**Explaining no bulk archive option**
